lessons.title: The Thinking in React Process
lessons.description: Overview of the 5‑step process to build React apps.

lessons.title: Step 1: Break UI into Components
lessons.description: Draw boxes around every component and subcomponent.

lessons.title: Step 2: Build a Static Version
lessons.description: Create a version with no interactivity, using props.

lessons.title: Step 3: Identify State and Events
lessons.description: Find the minimal set of mutable state and the events that change it.
